what: Check each discovered project path for existence, .nori/ directory, and .git/ directory
why: Determines which Claude Code projects already have Nori configured vs need setup

success_handling.criteria: All existing paths checked and annotated with has_nori and is_git flags

event.message: Nori status checked for all discovered projects

error_handling.scenario: Path no longer exists on disk
error_handling.criteria: existsSync returns false for project path
error_handling.action: Skip the project (filter out non-existent paths)

decisions.rationale: Same path always produces same ID; allows stable merge with Nori-registered projects by path comparison
Users may delete project directories; stale entries should not appear in the UI
